suppressedMessages.message: React Hook useEffect has a missing dependency: 'setView'. Either include it or remove the dependency array.

messages.message: Unsafe argument of type `any` assigned to a parameter of type `SetStateAction<SafetyCheck | null>`.
Unexpected any. Specify a different type.

suggestions.desc: Use `unknown` instead, this will force you to explicitly, and safely assert the type is correct.
Use `never` instead, this is useful when instantiating generic type parameters that you don't need to know the type of.

suppressedMessages.message: React Hook useMemo has a spread element in its dependency array. This means we can't statically verify whether you've passed the correct dependencies.
